survivalist.name: Survivalist

signature_weapon.name: Explosive-Tipped Crossbow
signature_weapon.description: A silent crossbow that fires explosive bolts. Can penetrate cover and detonate on impact or after a short delay. Low noise profile makes it suitable for tactical engagements.

survivalist.grenade: Incendiary Grenade — applies Burn status effect to enemies in the blast area
key_passives: E.M.I. — 15% increased Assault Rifle damage
Running The Gun — 15% increased Shotgun damage
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
Survivalist Tactical Link — teammates deal 10% bonus damage to targets affected by status effects
Elite Defense — 20% increased Protection from Elites
Triage Specialist — 15% increased outgoing healing
Crunch Time — 10% skill cooldown reduction while in cover
survivalist.notes: One of the three original launch specializations. The Survivalist Tactical Link is a powerful team passive that rewards status effect application across all enemy types. The Mender Seeker Mine makes this spec the premier support specialization for group content. Assault rifle and shotgun bonuses mean it accommodates a wide range of weapon preferences. The Incendiary Grenade pairs well with fire-based status builds.

demolitionist.name: Demolitionist

signature_weapon.name: M32A1 Multi-shot Grenade Launcher
signature_weapon.description: A six-round revolver-style grenade launcher that fires explosive grenades. Deals heavy area damage and can knock enemies out of cover. Each hit restores ammo to the signature weapon bar.

demolitionist.grenade: Fragmentation Grenade — applies Bleed status effect on detonation
key_passives: Spray and Pray — 15% increased SMG damage
Onslaught — 15% increased LMG damage
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
Explosive Ordnance — 25% increased Explosive damage
Demolitionist Tactical Link — teammates gain 5% damage bonus to targets out of cover
Incombustible — 20% increased Burn resistance
demolitionist.notes: One of the three original launch specializations. The Demolitionist is defined by its explosive synergy and area denial capabilities. The Artillery Turret provides unique mortar fire unavailable to other specs. The Demolitionist Tactical Link rewards aggressive out-of-cover play across the whole team. LMGs are the most popular weapon pairing. The Fragmentation Grenade's Bleed application synergizes with any bleed-amplifying gear.

sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter

signature_weapon.name: TAC-50 C Rifle
signature_weapon.description: A .50 caliber anti-material sniper rifle capable of penetrating multiple targets with a single shot. Deals extreme damage and can destroy enemy equipment in one hit. Awarded as the Sharpshooter's primary signature weapon.

sharpshooter.grenade: Flashbang Grenade — blinds and stuns enemies in the blast radius
key_passives: One In The Head — 25% increased Headshot damage
Sharpshooter Tactical Link — all teammates closer to the enemy than the Sharpshooter gain 10% Headshot damage bonus
Deft Hands — 30% increased Reload Speed
Breath Control — 30% increased Weapon Stability
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
sharpshooter.notes: One of the three original launch specializations. The Sharpshooter is the premier long-range specialization. The Tactical Link headshot bonus is a powerful passive for the whole team in coordinated play. The TAC-50 can penetrate multiple enemies in a line for exceptional multi-target value. The Tactician Drone provides unmatched reconnaissance and target marking. Flashbang grenade is effective for both PvE and PvP crowd control.

gunner.name: Gunner

signature_weapon.name: Minigun
signature_weapon.description: A belt-fed, multi-barrel rotary machine gun with an extremely high rate of fire. While the signature weapon is active, each bullet hit restores 1% armor to the player, up to a maximum of 50%. Requires a spin-up period before reaching full fire rate.

gunner.grenade: Riot Foam Grenade — immobilizes enemies by covering them in adhesive foam (applies Ensnare)
key_passives: Incessant — 5% armor on kill (stacking with each tier)
Hardened Armor — armor kits restore 50% bonus armor on top of normal 100% repair for 10 seconds
Supply Line — generates 10% of total ammo pool every 60 seconds; gives teammates 5%
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 40% increased signature weapon damage per tier (4 tiers)
Gunner Tactical Link — (ammo and resilience focused team passive)
Armor per Minigun Bullet — each active bullet hit restores 1% armor up to 50% max
gunner.weapon_damage_bonus: LMGs are the primary pairing; minigun armor-on-hit mechanic rewards sustained fire with any weapon
gunner.notes: Post-launch specialization added in Episode 1. The Gunner emphasizes sustained damage output and resilience. The minigun's armor restore mechanic creates a unique tank-DPS hybrid playstyle. Hardened Armor makes the Gunner extremely difficult to kill. The Banshee Pulse is uniquely powerful for crowd control as it ignores cover geometry. Riot Foam grenade provides reliable crowd immobilization.

technician.name: Technician

signature_weapon.name: P-017 Missile Launcher
signature_weapon.description: A guided missile launcher capable of locking onto and targeting up to 6 enemies simultaneously before firing a salvo. Each missile homes in on its designated target. Excellent for clearing multiple priority targets or eliminating enemy skill proxies.

technician.grenade: EMP Grenade — damages and disrupts enemy technology, applying Disrupt status effect to all electronics in the blast radius
key_passives: Amped — grants +1 Skill Tier (a defining and unique passive among all specializations)
Overclocked CPU — 10% increased Skill Damage
Dismantling — increased damage against robotic enemies (drones, dogs, Warhounds)
Emergency Patch — armor kits also repair and restore friendly skill proxies in range
Technician Tactical Link — teammates can benefit from Artificer Hive skill efficiency boost
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
technician.weapon_damage_bonus: Pistols/Sidearms (secondary focus); primary value is the +1 Skill Tier passive rather than weapon damage bonuses
best_for: skill builds at max skill tier
hybrid weapon-skill builds needing extra skill tier
technician.notes: Post-launch specialization. The Technician's defining feature is the +1 Skill Tier passive (Amped), which is unique among all specializations and enables players to reach skill tier 6 with fewer gear pieces invested, freeing up attribute slots for weapon damage. This makes it the go-to specialization for any skill-centric build. The EMP grenade is highly versatile against Black Tusk faction content. The P-017 six-target tracking is exceptional for clearing grouped elite enemies.

firewall.name: Firewall

signature_weapon.name: K8-JetStream Flamethrower
signature_weapon.description: A military-grade flamethrower with a 15-meter arc of fire. Deals continuous fire damage and applies Burn status effect to all enemies in the cone. Functions exclusively in conjunction with the Striker Shield, requiring it to be active to use the flamethrower effectively.

firewall.grenade: Cluster Grenade — splits on detonation into multiple smaller explosive bursts covering a wider area
key_passives: Firewall Tactical Link — allies deal 10% more damage to all enemies within 10 meters of the Firewall agent
Fiery Response — apply Burn to enemies within 5 meters when the Firewall agent's armor breaks
Firestarter Shotgun — increases the probability of enemies igniting on fire from shotgun shots
Ammo Acquisition — killing enemies within 10 meters adds 3 rounds to the signature weapon ammo bar
Shock Hardened Frame — adds a health bonus to the Striker Shield
High-Octane Gasoline Mixture — enhances flamethrower volatility and damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 40% increased signature weapon damage per tier (4 tiers)
firewall.weapon_damage_bonus: Shotguns (via Firestarter Shotgun passive) and close-range weapons benefit most from the 10m tactical link radius
firewall.notes: Post-launch specialization. The Firewall is built around aggressive close-quarters combat and fire damage synergy. The Striker Shield enables use of the flamethrower and provides damage buffs to sheltering allies based on enemy count — the more enemies in front, the higher the buff. The Firewall Tactical Link rewards maintaining close proximity to enemies, which pairs naturally with the flamethrower. Cluster Grenade provides wide AoE coverage, useful for breaking enemy formations before engaging at close range. The Fiery Response armor-break Burn is a powerful deterrent to enemies who focus fire on the Firewall player.
